body:
## Changelog
### Features
* 7aee332250ebde2b20be4b2f938c1adb1f406b38 feat: Support YubiKeys in KeePassXC open mode
### Documentation updates
* f67e048b73e2c2c24cbae300e7799675f7604d49 docs: Add home page section on getting help
* ea8d95d031f62769117b4bb1796e4d58557d72cb docs: Add Stack Overflow to social media links
* 37eab816d118c914779ad626c39951dcc5d0416b docs: Add FAQ entry on using delta as the diff tool
* fdb2065f166daec64a9df59fcdf7ad7d8f68710f docs: Add FAQ entry on running scripts periodically
* a3de4a83a22bd248f83a7ab5fa15345ce226bada docs: Add FAQ entry on running a script when a git-repo external changes
* b56a6005e871d1ba3abe60bd8b923f1ec2ce42f7 docs: Add FAQ entry on literal {{ and }} in templates
* d414e0fc7839ca97d20b82904a290ff444c4575c docs: Add warning on using externals for large files or archives
* d9f471784e354f8230c3d2a5e69edb04b15e6f2c docs: Add how to use VSCode as the diff and merge tool
* 2a64e42821988400257e1214e755bfa65a790f5a docs: Make features and portability more prominent on home page
* 3a171018f76c814f0e1c88136058e5627f2d8d35 docs: Add links to articles
* 0355a62a8afdb820ffa22291e56e0dafec6f49c0 docs: Add link to blog
* 1ac30149615b248b17dc82f38ca2d19a7f9a180a docs: Add github.com/b3nj5m1n/xdg-ninja to related software
name: v2.52.2
